mapper.sql: c.id, c.author_id, c.title, c.summary, c.cover_url, c.status, c.sort_order, c.subscriber_count, c.article_count, c.intro, c.difficulty, c.estimated_minutes, c.source_type, c.source_note, c.recommended, c.recommend_weight, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.deleted_at, c.version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_column c WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM blog_column c WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY c.recommended DESC, c.recommend_weight DESC, c.sort_order ASC, c.subscriber_count DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_column WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT FROM blog_column c WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY c.recommended DESC, c.recommend_weight DESC, c.sort_order ASC, c.subscriber_count DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_column ( id, author_id, title, summary, cover_url, status, sort_order, subscriber_count, article_count, intro, difficulty, estimated_minutes, source_type, source_note, recommended, recommend_weight, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{authorId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{coverUrl}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{subscriberCount}, #{articleCount}, #{intro}, #{difficulty}, #{estimatedMinutes}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceNote}, #{recommended}, #{recommendWeight}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deletedAt}, #{version} )
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_column SET author_id = #{authorId}, title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, subscriber_count = #{subscriberCount}, article_count = #{articleCount}, intro = #{intro}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, estimated_minutes = #{estimatedMinutes}, source_type = #{sourceType}, source_note = #{sourceNote}, recommended = #{recommended}, recommend_weight = #{recommendWeight}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ca.article_id FROM blog_column_article ca INNER JOIN blog_article a ON a.id = ca.article_id WHERE ca.column_id = #{columnId} AND ca.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY COALESCE(ca.step_order, ca.sort_order) ASC, ca.sort_order ASC, ca.id ASC

SELECT ca.article_id AS articleId, COALESCE(NULLIF(ca.section_title, ''), '推荐阅读') AS sectionTitle, COALESCE(ca.step_order, ca.sort_order, 0) AS stepOrder, COALESCE(ca.required, 1) AS required, COALESCE(ca.editor_note, '') AS editorNote FROM blog_column_article ca INNER JOIN blog_article a ON a.id = ca.article_id WHERE ca.column_id = #{columnId} AND ca.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY COALESCE(ca.step_order, ca.sort_order) ASC, ca.sort_order ASC, ca.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_column_article SET deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW(), sort_order = #{sortOrder}, version = version + 1 WHERE column_id = #{columnId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_column_article (column_id, article_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{columnId}, #{articleId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_column SET article_count = article_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{columnId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_column SET article_count = GREATEST(0, article_count - 1), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{columnId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_column_article SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE column_id = #{columnId} AND article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM blog_column c WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND ( c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.intro LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.source_note LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY
c.subscriber_count DESC, c.id DESC
c.id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_column c WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND ( c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.intro LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.source_note LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_column WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_column SET deleted_at=NOW(),updated_at=NOW(),version=version+1 WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_column (id, author_id, title, summary, cover_url, status, sort_order, subscriber_count, article_count, intro, difficulty, estimated_minutes, source_type, source_note, recommended, recommend_weight, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version) VALUES (#{id}, #{authorId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{coverUrl}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{subscriberCount}, #{articleCount}, #{intro}, #{difficulty}, #{estimatedMinutes}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceNote}, #{recommended}, #{recommendWeight}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deletedAt}, #{version}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE author_id = #{authorId}, title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, subscriber_count = #{subscriberCount}, article_count = #{articleCount}, intro = #{intro}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, estimated_minutes = #{estimatedMinutes}, source_type = #{sourceType}, source_note = #{sourceNote}, recommended = #{recommended}, recommend_weight = #{recommendWeight}, updated_at = NOW(), deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, version = version + 1
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_column c WHERE c.author_id = #{authorId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_column WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
